qrText.description: QR text decoded from the uploaded paper by browser/API, or omitted when the model service has OpenCV QR decoding enabled.

student_id.description: Optional metadata only. Full-page validation requires student_id from QR.

paper_id.description: Optional metadata only. Full-page validation requires paper_id from QR.

test_id.description: Optional metadata only. Full-page validation requires test_id from QR.

imageDataUrl.description: Full scanned answer-sheet image as a data URL.

template.description: Optional inline template. If omitted, the service loads services/model/templates/{paper_id}.json.
